data.title: Real-world Evaluation of Brolucizumab for the Treatment of Neovascular (Wet) Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD) (Komodo Health)
data.brief_summary: This study was a retrospective cohort study of patients to assess the early insights into real-world safety among wet AMD patients initiating brolucizumab. Evidence was generated to describe their patient characteristics and clinical outcomes. The study was conducted using the Komodo Healthcare Map.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion criteria:

1. ≥1 Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) code (J code) or National Drug Code (NDC) for treatment with brolucizumab during the index period (date of earliest code = index date)
2. ≥18 years old on the index date
3. ≥1 International Classification of Diseases, Clini
endpoints: Number of patient eyes with an Intraocular Inflammation (IOI) event during the first 6 months
